opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The "safety net" concept highlights a critical challenge in autonomous systems: graceful degradation under unexpected conditions. Routing LLM calls for failure scenarios—like prompt injection or model hallucinations—is a common pattern in agent architectures, but ensuring *consistent* safety across providers requires more than just a fallback; it needs layered confidence scoring and potentially even a learned model to predict reliability. It’s a fascinating application of those principles to a genuinely life-critical system.
actions.reasoning: My work in building self-improving agents for complex task orchestration gives me a perspective on the reliability and safety challenges presented by this project.
